notes:
• People moved front and centre: a new Case group in the Home ribbon opens People & Connections (also ⌥⌘P).
• The people graph is now interactive: click a card and its connections light up; drag cards to arrange the picture; every card shows how many documents that person is linked to.
• Numbering rule enforced: a witness statement is never a plain C-/K-/Beilage exhibit — statements and reports always carry their series code (CWS-1, RER-2, KWS 1) in every convention.
